creator: mwisnicki+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Trac does not work at all when trac-accountmanager-plugin is installed, thoughI've tried removing the plugin and it still does not work:

Trac detected an internal error:

AttributeError: NullTranslationsBabel instance has no attribute 'isactive'


This is a known problem and a patch is available:

http://trac.edgewall.org/ticket/11345
https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1089490
https://bugs.archlinux.org/task/37982

Fix: 

Apply patch from link above.
